form.formComment: Won her last two including a strong win last start over 407m at this track by 5 lengths in a Grade 5. Form strong and a huge chance to register the hat-trick.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 407m. Last start finished 4th over 407m at this track beaten 15 lengths (24.22) behind Cody's Star in a Grade 5 on March 29. Rates highly on best form. Expected to feature.
